last_cycle.summary: Q105 done: mock_mdas_gate.py. AND MDAS=0.111 vs OR MDAS=0.147 (1.31x, p<0.0001). 91.7% gate classification accuracy. Confirms AND-gate features more disentangled (lower MDAS bleed) than OR-gate features.
